name: 折叠刀（★） | 都市伪装
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been spray-painted using a tangle of masking tape as a stencil. True power is demonstrated with subtle application
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这把武器以交杂在一起的胶带为漏字板进行了喷漆。 真正的力量总是用精细的应用加以证明
